text.title: Discovery Cadence Design Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid Discovery Cadence Design output. Subagent must satisfy this before returning to the caller.

forbidden.pattern: assumption_queue length < 1 AND cadence has been active >30 days

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim narrative fields to ≤500 chars preserving named entities + numeric claims.
Promote a 'no decision yet' state to status='pending' rather than fabricating a decision.

list.item: interview_slot populated with a typed value
ost_refresh_cycle populated with a typed value
assumption_queue populated with a typed value
shared_space_url populated with a typed value
review_date populated with a typed value
owner populated with a typed value
No forbidden pattern matches the output
